page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.6xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance featuring an Intel Xeon 8163 processor with 24 dedicated physical cores running at 2.5 GHz. The instance is equipped with 93.0 GB of system memory, providing 3.88 GB per core. Acceleration is delivered via a single NVIDIA T4 GPU based on the Turing architecture, which includes 16 GB of VRAM. This instance does not include local storage and relies on network-attached storage, operating with an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth under a KVM hypervisor.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear division between CPU and GPU capabilities. Single-core CPU performance is relatively weak, scoring in the bottom 25% on stress-ng and Geekbench tests, with single-threaded gzip compression falling into the bottom 10%. However, multi-core CPU execution and memory bandwidth fall within the average range. The integrated NVIDIA T4 GPU delivers strong performance for specialized workloads, achieving top-tier results in LLM inference prompt processing for both small and medium models, alongside strong text generation speeds for 7B parameter models.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.gn6i-c24g1.6xlarge offers a balanced entry-point for GPU-accelerated workloads without the premium cost of high-end accelerator hardware. The trade-off involves lower single-core CPU performance and the lack of local storage, meaning workloads requiring high sequential CPU throughput or fast local disk I/O are less suitable. This instance is best suited for machine learning inference, small-to-medium LLM deployment, ray tracing, and general-purpose GPU-assisted compute tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.6xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine configured with 24 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 CPU cores running at 2.5 GHz, 93.0 GB of system memory, and a single NVIDIA T4 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM. It operates on the x86_64 architecture under a KVM hypervisor and provides an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, though it lacks local storage. Benchmark data shows weak single-core CPU performance but average multi-core and memory bandwidth capabilities. The server excels in GPU-driven tasks, demonstrating top-tier performance in prompt processing for small and medium language models. This hardware profile makes the instance highly suitable for machine learning inference, ray tracing, and moderate parallel computing workloads where GPU acceleration offsets the lower single-core CPU speeds.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.6xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 24 Intel Xeon cores, 93 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA T4 GPU with 16 GB VRAM, optimized for machine learning inference and parallel workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.6xlarge features 24 Intel Xeon cores, 93 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA T4 GPU for machine learning inference.
tagline: An accelerator-equipped virtual machine delivering dedicated Intel Xeon processing and NVIDIA T4 GPU capabilities for parallel computing and machine learning inference.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8163 processor with 24 dedicated physical cores at 2.5 GHz
NVIDIA T4 GPU with 16 GB VRAM for hardware acceleration
93.0 GB of system memory and 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Top-tier performance in LLM inference prompt processing
No local storage included, requiring network-attached storage
Best suited for machine learning inference and ray tracing workloads
